files.purpose: Front controller: security headers, CSP, CSRF gate on every POST, base-path stripping, then routing.
files.runs_when: Every request not served as a static file.
files.test_after_change: Load a GET page and submit a POST form; confirm CSP headers and that CSRF still gates POSTs.

files.purpose: The complete route table mapping method+path to a controller action.
files.runs_when: On every request, to build the router.
files.test_after_change: Hit the added/changed route and confirm dispatch; check unknown routes still 404.

files.purpose: The single PDO access path (SQLite/MySQL); prepared-statement helpers and transactions.
files.runs_when: First database access in a request.
files.test_after_change: Run a read and a write on both SQLite and MySQL; confirm foreign keys and transactions.

files.purpose: Session auth: login/logout, requireLogin/requireVerified/requireAdmin, intended-URL redirects.
files.runs_when: On protected actions and after login.
files.test_after_change: Sign in/out; hit a verified-only and an admin-only route as different roles.

files.purpose: The single CSRF gate verified for every POST in the front controller.
files.test_after_change: Submit a form with and without a valid token; confirm rejection on failure.

files.purpose: Route matching and dispatch, including 404/405 handling.
files.runs_when: Every request, after the CSRF gate.
files.test_after_change: Confirm parameterised routes resolve and unknown paths 404.

files.purpose: The core loop: renders gather/review/approved states and every write transition (paste, checks, approve, edit, reopen, restore) with strict step ordering.
files.test_after_change: Run a Recipe end to end: paste, confirm checks, approve; verify order-locking and version immutability.

files.purpose: Builds the copyable prompt by substituting Pantry values and approved-Artifact contents, with matching highlighted HTML.
files.test_after_change: Render a prompt with filled and missing fields and a chained artifact; confirm text matches highlights.

files.purpose: Parses a pasted response against a Recipe's output contract to produce structural evidence for Quality Checks.
files.runs_when: Rendering the review state of a Recipe with an output contract.
files.test_after_change: Parse responses with present, missing, and duplicate sections; confirm found/missing/manual status.

files.purpose: Builds the export zip: numbered Markdown files, a self-contained kit.html reader, and a README manifest.
files.runs_when: When a user builds an export.
files.test_after_change: Export a completed project; open kit.html offline; confirm every approved artifact and the Pantry appear.

files.purpose: Escapes pasted (untrusted) content first, then applies a small Markdown allowlist to the escaped text.
files.test_after_change: Render content containing HTML/script; confirm it is escaped, then formatted.

files.purpose: The single place Collection membership resolves (editorial/dynamic/attribute) and the surfacing gate is applied.
files.test_after_change: Confirm a collection below min_display_count 404s and editorial/dynamic/attribute types resolve.

files.purpose: Public and admin metrics computed only from simulation rows, plus the activity heatmap.
files.runs_when: Rendering the home activity, admin overview, and metrics.
files.test_after_change: Confirm metrics count only simulation=1 rows and never mix in real users.

files.purpose: Start a project (executable gate), the Pantry form and validation, project routing, and deletion.
files.test_after_change: Start from an executable and a preview Cookbook; submit valid and invalid Pantry values.

files.purpose: Export page, build gate (all approved), and owner-scoped zip download from outside the web root.
files.test_after_change: Try to export before all steps are approved (refused); download another user's export id (404).

files.purpose: Register, login (rate-limited), email verification, and the forgot/reset-password flow.
files.test_after_change: Register, verify, log in, and rate-limit; confirm generic errors avoid user enumeration.

files.purpose: Account settings: profile, preferences, security (password/email change), data export, onboarding, deletion.
files.test_after_change: Change password and email; export data; delete an account and confirm the cascade.

files.purpose: The searchable marketplace listing and the full Cookbook detail page.
files.test_after_change: Search the marketplace; open a Cookbook detail with related Cookbooks; open an unknown slug (404).

files.purpose: One shared category index and detail route with difficulty and executable/preview filters.
files.test_after_change: Filter a category by level and executable/preview; open a hidden category (404).

files.purpose: Read-only admin overview gated by requireAdmin.
files.test_after_change: Open /admin as admin and non-admin; confirm the non-admin is refused.

files.purpose: Artifact and version access: addVersion (append-only), approve/reopen, confirmed checks, status-by-recipe.
files.runs_when: Every Runner write and read of artifacts.
files.test_after_change: Paste, edit, restore, and approve; confirm versions are never mutated and history is intact.

files.purpose: Project lifecycle: create, ownership lookup, Pantry values, markPantrySaved, markCompleteIfDone, delete.
files.runs_when: Project and Pantry actions and the Runner.
files.test_after_change: Create, save pantry, complete, and delete a project; confirm ownership scoping (404 for others).

files.purpose: Catalog access: marketplace search, findBySlug, featured, inCategory, listing helpers.
files.test_after_change: Search, open by slug, and start from a Cookbook; confirm preview vs executable handling.

files.purpose: Recipe access: forCookbook (ordered), checks, evidenceKeys, outputContract.
files.runs_when: Rendering a Cookbook or a Recipe step.
files.test_after_change: Load recipes in order and their checks; confirm contract parsing keys line up.

files.purpose: Pantry field definitions per Cookbook and option decoding for select/multiselect.
files.test_after_change: Render and validate each field type; confirm multiselect JSON round-trips.

files.purpose: The SQLite schema, kept in lockstep with the MySQL dialect; the data model of the whole app.
files.test_after_change: Change both dialects together; re-seed fresh and confirm foreign keys and indexes.

files.purpose: The MySQL (production) schema dialect, kept identical in shape to the SQLite one.
files.test_after_change: Keep in lockstep with schema.sqlite.sql; re-seed on MySQL and confirm the FK migrate path.

files.purpose: CLI seeder: applies schema, upserts the versioned catalog by slug, provisions the admin, resets passwords.
files.runs_when: Run by an operator (never over HTTP).
files.test_after_change: Run on a fresh and an existing DB; confirm idempotent upsert and --status health.

files.purpose: Configuration template (env, db driver, session, exports dir, mail); copied to gitignored config.php.
files.test_after_change: Confirm the app runs with defaults (SQLite) and with production overrides.

files.purpose: The three-state Runner UI (gather wizard / review / approved) and the copy-prompt and check controls.
files.test_after_change: Walk the wizard, review, and approved states at a narrow width and with JS off.
